summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Scalable Phase 1 - AI-powered SaaS to PaaS platform. All core functionality working correctly including auth system, dashboard, project management, and API endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: Test script used incorrect selector for 'API Keys' nav item (should be 'api keys' with space)
minor_issues.note: Application works correctly, test script issue only

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - creates users with JWT tokens
GET /api/auth/me - returns current user when authenticated
POST /api/projects - creates projects with auth required
GET /api/projects/:id - gets single project with ownership verification
Frontend login page renders with all elements
Frontend register page renders with all elements
Dashboard shows empty state for new users
New project modal creates projects successfully
Sidebar navigation works (dashboard, connect, docs, analytics, settings)
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
JWT tokens stored and used properly
